name: Clash of Legions
description: Clash of Legions is an incredibly fun, fast−paced fantasy tactical Collectible Card .Open booster packs to reveal a variety of cards from 7 different races and build a powerful deck to take to battle. Choose from 1 of 4 unique classes and exploit its unique skill set to your advantage and play−style

name: Big Klondike - Classic Solitaire
description: Free to play classic solitaire.

name: Falling As Lightning
description: Plan and build a deck of cards to represent your government, then use the structure you created to mobilize the military and unite warring star systems under the guiding light of your political ideology.

name: The Magister - The First Two Days
description: The Magister: The First Two Days gives you the chance to begin your investigation in this murder-mystery card-battler RPG. Build and customize your deck to fight in battles, or use ‘Tactical Diplomacy’ to pacify those who stand in your way. Gather clues and investigate the death of your predecessor!

name: Monster Evo
description: The Player will play the role as the Pet Trainer, who can capture the wild Pets in the field and advance them to higher stats. The Upgrade system in this game is called “Evolve”, which will help the pets to learn new skills and obtain stronger BP!

name: Dire Wolf Game Room
description: Collect your favorite tabletop and digital Dire Wolf board games in one convenient virtual place!

name: Rise of Humanity: Prologue
description: Experience the first events taking place in Rise of Humanity – a game that uniquely fuses turn-based strategy & deck-building. Build decks for each hero, collect, upgrade & merge powerful cards, and plan your strategy wisely to save humankind from the machines!

name: Zombie Strike
description: Zombie Strike is a strategy RPG with AFK gameplay and various elements. Survivors can recruit heroes, transform zombies, build a mighty team to defend their home! This game has high intelligence AI automatic play. Let's say goodbye to manual operation, free your hands!

name: Warhammer Combat Cards
description: Build a powerful army of cards from your favourite faction in the Warhammer 40,000 universe and battle other players in fast-paced, turn based online combat! In the grim darkness of the far future there is only war!

name: Causa, Voices of the Dusk
description: Causa, Voices of the Dusk is an intriguing turn-based strategy card game with innovative game mechanics. Sacrifice cards to raise your Cause, and bring them back later for unexpected powerful plays. Prove your abilities in battle and draft your way to Victory in extremely challenging campaigns.

name: Rise of the Slime: Prologue
description: Rise of the Slime: Prologue is a free snippet of the first zone in Slime's adventure. Be the hero that no-one saw coming. Help Slime defy the odds by playing insanely powerful cards in this charming, relaxing and strategic deckbuilding adventure.

name: Godsbane
description: Craft explosive combos of units and powers to use in head-to-head auto battler combat against friends, other players or challenging AI. Outplay your opponent with strategic maneuvers and watch the battle unfold on a tabletop arena.

name: Kurukshetra: Ascension
description: Test your skills in an all-new strategic card battler. Master swift positioning with melee and ranged rows. Plan your path to victory in the dead of night. Explore a deeply rooted universe in a rogue-lite story campaign. Collect, build, command your army, and emerge victorious.

name: Bombagun
description: A deceptively simple, post-apocalyptic style card game that you can play both online and offline!

name: Board Game Engine
description: The Board Game Engine was built with game developers in mind as a tool for designing and prototyping your very own tabletop games with as much freedom as possible.

name: NewHrdGame
description: An ancient Chinese folk puzzle game

name: Crystal Clash
description: Crystal Clash is a mix of Lane Battles and Deckbuilding - with action-packed tug-of-war strategy, just like your favorite RTS mods from back in the day! :) Play 2v2 or co-op with a friend, or pair up with new allies and enemies! Collect cards, build your decks and have fun crushing your enemies!

name: Beyond the Board - DTDA Games
description: Explore this strange land, play board games, meet other explorers, and battle them around a game table! Beyond the Board allows you to play mini games, and two different board games, Apogee and Light Hunters.

name: Spin City
description: "Spin City" is a simulator of an elite casino full of secrets, where you can fully plunge in the world of excitement and try your luck, enjoying the elegant neon design. Make risky bets, feel free to spin the roulette wheel and win in real time!

name: Not Another Dungeon?!
description: The demonic Tower of Imalsrith has appeared on the battlefield of the Kingdom of Infantriell and the Empire of Fractile. Conquer it in this action-packed card game with rogue-lite elements!

name: Card Game Simulator
description: Create, Share, and Play with Card Game Simulator

name: Solaris Rift
description: Solaris Rift is a roguelike card game featuring variable encounters, sci-fi narrative, and strategic gameplay. Face off against the terrifying storm drones of the Satex Army, the saboteurs of the gang known as the RogueStars, and the venomous vinelings of the Queen of Thorns.

name: Fatal Core
description: Fatal Core is a 100% free, community-driven Trading Card Game. Assume the role of one of 6 Lead Characters and battle in a dystopian future full of strange magic and alien technology! Fatal Core features many unusual mechanics, including simultaneous play, open hands, player market, and more.

name: Golf Solitaire Simple
description: A simple Golf Solitaire game with several common rule variations and a challenge mode! Can you beat all of the levels?

name: Cards of the Dead - Prologue
description: Cards of the Dead - Prologue is a free standalone version of the game 'Cards of the Dead'. This is beginning of a story where you start on the outskirts of town.

name: FAWE: Enchanted Forest
description: 2 clicks magic

name: Alphadeck
description: Pixel Trading Card Game with over 170 cards to play! Build up your Deck and defeat your enemies because it's time for BATTLE!

name: Indigo Loop
description: Indigo Loop is a quick-count, time management puzzle game with a splash of strategy and luck. It shares the classic puzzle game spirit of being easy to pick up and challenging to master.

name: Mage Noir - Infinity
description: Mage Noir is a strategy card game. Become true Mages and fight with the power of the elements. Craft your spells and make good use of the shared Mana pool to defeat your opponent.

name: Hero Realms
description: From the makers of the award-winning Star Realms Deckbuilding Game ®, Hero Realms combines the fun of deckbuilding games with the interactivity of trading card game-style combat.

name: Endlanders : First Encounter
description: Build your deck, glitch through enemies, translate unknown languages and decipher the mysteries of this universe, in this grid-based real time combat indie game. This version features only one playable character and serves as the prologue for the game.

name: 鳥獣妖怪戯画　(Choju Yokai Giga)
description: The mysterious Yokai Monogatari has been opened, unleashing Yokai into the world! Help Miko seal them away and restore peace to the village. Build your deck and summon animals to defeat Yokai in this side-scrolling platformer!

name: World Seed
description: A simple game with big ambitions. Fight creatures, explore the world and progress your character in this ever changing world.

name: The Vaults
description: The Vaults is a turn-based RPG card game where you will engage with creatures and beings of other worlds, Explore powerful scrolls and weapons, find treasures, learn abilities, and upgrade your keepers to save the mysterious world of Alexandria!

name: Shadow Era
description: Shadow Era is the full scale, cross-platform collectible trading card game that you've been looking for, with the most generous free to play system out there! Enjoy the amazing dark fantasy artwork in a card game where strategy is most important.

name: Lawnarchy
description: A card game for gardening lunatics: manicure your lawn, trim your hedges – and steam roll over your neighbors' flowers!

name: The Conqueror of Battles
description: Be ready to join epic multiplayer battles PVP or PVE. Create your team of heroes and improve them to annihilate your enemies and win battles. Discover also a unique and exciting progression system. Join the arena now!

name: Nadir: A Grimdark Deck Builder - Prologue
description: Nadir is a roguelike deck-builder with a twist: the cost to play a card is an enemy reaction you can predict. Craft your own cards to slay powerful demons. Gather resources, expand your city, grow in power and conquer the underworld.

name: I Am Gangster
description: This is a 2D Deck Building, Turn-Based, Card Strategy, Gangster Management experience. Use your cards to help in battle or in the open city. This game comes with 1 loopable city to take over in which the enemy becomes harder to defeat after every win!

name: Little Obedient Robot
description: Take control of a little obedient robot that you program with cards you find. Learn new cards to outmaneuver your enemies. This is our experimental strategy/2D side-scrolling hybrid.

name: ULTRA LMAD
description: A free roguelike deckbuilder about becoming an LMAD in a fantasy way. Get cards by taking classes, build a deck to battle against projects and complete all semesters to graduate.

name: Tournament Ark
description: A heavily anime-inspired deck builder. You play as one of the participants in the Tournament Ark, a combat tournament held on an interdimensional boat. Pick the right moves, choose the correct passive abilities for your build and combine the right cards to become the champion!

name: Duelyst II
description: Choose your faction, construct your deck and put your strategy to the test in the evolution of the ultimate collectible tactics game.

name: Monster Stalker: Prologue
description: Monster Stalker: Prologue is a free independent version of Monster Stalker, tells the early stage story of Monster Stalker. It combines card battle and RPG. Aliens invade earth and monsters are coming. You will build deck, fight various monsters and get teammates. Go fight and save earth!

name: Oceans
description: Adapt your Species to survive and thrive in the Oceans depths in this turn-based strategy game based on the hit board game Oceans.

name: GrassGames Hearts 3
description: The best Hearts Card Game around.

name: Card Survival: Tropical Island - The First Days
description: Card Survival is a card-based survival experience. Stranded on a desert island you must use your wits and skills to stay alive. Use cards and combine them together to explore, gather resources and craft useful tools.

name: World Mahjong
description: This board game is a mahjong game played by 4 people or computer.learn and play by this App about the [Traditional Chinese Mahjong] and [Japan Riich Mahjong] Game.

name: RUNGORE: Beginner Experience
description: Card game mechanics - check. Real time battles - check. Silly humor - check. If this isn't the game of your dreams i don't know what is (Also we have hidden memes everywhere lol)

name: Speed the Card Game
description: Speed a card game also known as Spit or Slam, is very fast-paced game. Speed is a game for two players of the shedding family of card games.

name: ​Triple Fantasy
description: Win the battle through various card combinations! Tactical Card Battle RPG!

name: Kingdom Draw
description: A hybrid of challenging turn-based strategy and customizable card collection gameplay set in a medieval fantasy universe.

name: Last Of Ark: Prologue
description: A roguelike deckbuilding tactics game that combines elements from 'Monster Train' and 'Into the Breach'.The player needs to establish organization in a destroyed world, defend against enemy attacks, and restore order.

name: Half-Earth Socialism
description: Try your hand as a global planner of a future society. Play with a wide range of technologies and policies spanning different fields and ideologies. Will you lead the world to ecological utopia or planetary ruin?

name: Green New Deal Simulator
description: Achieve zero emissions and full employment in this casual card-driven game.

name: Creeping Deck: Pharaoh's Curse Prologue
description: Creeping Deck is a strategic roguelite deck-builder with RPG elements. Build and refine your deck as you progress through each dungeon, facing off against bosses and enemies. Upgrade, and unlock new skills, options, and artifacts to protect all of Egypt!

name: Grant of God
description: This is a synchronous turn-based card battle game where you build your card deck through the combination of characters, weapons and equipment to meet any challenge. welcome to my world:the land of godgrant.

name: Dire Destiny : Time Travel
description: Dire Destiny: Time Travel is a Roguelike tactic card game, which takes place in a steampunk world. You are summoned from another time and space to be the hero, who will fight against powerful mechanized army to save the human race.

name: Towers Together: Beginnings
description: Towers together is a cooperative tower defense game with cards. Combine your cards with your friends’ cards to achieve powerful combo, but get ready to fail and laugh together. Build towers, cast spells, have fun with friends!

name: Shogun Showdown: Prologue
description: Fight the army of the Shogun in this free version of Shogun Showdown, a turn-based combat game with rogue-like and deck-building elements. Position yourself and attack at the right time, upgrade your tiles and combo them to get ready to face the Shogun!

name: Hitstun
description: Hitstun is a turn based fighting game with online matchmaking. Challenge your friends to an exciting battle with diverse characters and movesets.

name: Gridlocke
description: Gridlocke is a roguelike deckbuilder tactics game. Choose a faction and guide them to victory against the enemy's armies using a combination of careful deckbuilding, strategical placement, and resource management.

name: Monster Battle
description: "Monster Battle" is a cute and charming roguelike deck builder featuring adorable monsters. Journey through a randomly generated world, build an army of monsters and defeat foes with strategic deckbuilding.

name: Deck of the Dead
description: "Deck of the Dead" is a thrilling roguelike deckbuilder game set in a dark, mysterious world of vampires. Players will take on the role of a powerful vampire on a quest for ultimate power as they build their deck, defeat enemies, and explore a randomly generated world filled with danger and secrets.

name: Stacks:Space!
description: Stacks:Space is a space-themed base builder card game with rogue-like elements. Buy booster packs to get new cards, discover craft recipes by stacking cards together, create structures, manufacture drones and droids, defend your base from enemies, visit distant planets, and more!

name: Emotions: Social MeDie
description: Can't get off the smarthone? Be careful because your every interaction will affect your emotions and if they become too intense they could turn into real demons, which you will be forced to face when display turns off. Can you survive long enough?

name: ANGEL DROID
description: Angel Droid is an unfinished experiment that explores a crafting system inspired by Elder Scrolls, Magicka, Vampire Survivors, and many more. This game is rough around the edges, and now exists as a home to the developer's original soundtrack written 15 years before the game's release.

name: Rue
description: A card game about decisions, love and regret.

name: HAXWARE COMGAM
description: COMGAM is a free Trading Card Game that you can play that takes place in the HAXWARE universe. Configure a team of 5 Warrior Cards, & take them online to battle other players around the world to prove that your configured team is the best.

name: HELLCARD: Prologue
description: HELLCARD: Prologue lets you try the main game's Singleplayer and Multiplayer modes. Descend into the paper dungeons on your own, recruit computer-controlled companions or join other gamers in fast-paced tactical card battles against the armies of darkness and the Archdemon himself!

name: NSFW Solitaire & Puzzles
description: 191 solitaire games + 21 puzzles with nudity and sex. Many kinks and fetishes: catgirls, orgies, sex machines, cumshots, pussy squirts, futanaris, femboys, furry/monster, bondage, pregnant, and more. Full customization. Cards editor.

name: Venture Valley
publisher: Singleton Foundation for Financial Literacy and Entrepreneurship
description: Be Your Own Boss!

name: 召唤之王 (Supreme Summoner)
description: ‘Supreme Summoner’ is a turn-based strategy chess game. Taking the imaginative Romance of the Three Kingdoms as its theme, it innovatively blends elements of gods, demons, and mystical creatures, making each faction and character's attributes even more prominent.

name: 聊斋搜神记
developer: 成都易游时空网络科技有限公司
publisher: 成都易游时空网络科技有限公司
description: 玩家在游戏中可以收集到聊斋作品中的灵将作为自己的战斗伙伴，通过操控这些灵将在聊斋世界中闯关战斗，既体验了聊斋作品，又深入了解灵将背后的故事。在游戏中玩家可将各种灵将进行搭配、思考如何利用灵将的特性有效闯关。《聊斋搜神记》会更加的突出灵将的表现效果和性格特色，多达百个不同的特点的灵将也极大地丰富了游戏的可玩性。

name: Sefirot Shards
description: A collectible card RPG set in a fantasy world. Turn-based PVP battles on the arena against real opponents and vast locations for battling monsters. Collect a squad, level up your hero, and uncover all the secrets of Sefirot!

name: Railroads & Catacombs: Prologue
description: Start your training in Railroads & Catacombs! Learn how to build your cards in the most effective way. Test your deck against the first boss and master your strategy for the full game.

name: Knightmares
description: Face yourself in an epic tale of honor, courage and fusions. Knightmares will make you see fantasy from... A different point of view.

name: Under Pressure
description: Flee or hunt? It’s up to you! Under Pressure is an asymmetric card game! To win you will need to strategize and guess.

name: Cards We're Dealt: Prologue
description: Wander haunted halls as an office temp and collect magical cards with supernatural abilities to fight demons and and explore the underworld in this horror, deckbuilding, roguelike game.

name: 疾风猎人-上线送V10，超变独家版本
description: 《疾风猎人-福利版》上线送V10+百万钻石+无限抽奖 礼包一：钻石*1000，装备之匙*5，坐骑培养石*5…； 礼包二：钻石*1000，装备之匙*5，坐骑培养石*5…; 礼包三：钻石*1000，异界召唤券*1，传说宝玉*5…； 更多免费礼包请通过下方联系方式添加客服领取。

name: Deck of Life: No Turns, Individual Card Permadeath
description: A card battler where cards are your health. No turns, individual card permadeath. Construct defenses while launching projectiles to destroy your opponent's cards. Beat enemies and events to win cards from unique card pools. If all your cards on the field are destroyed, you die.

name: Death Roads: Tournament Prologue
description: Experience unprecedented car battles by merging the thrill of deadly racing, the strategic depth of deckbuilding, and the unpredictable nature of roguelite gameplay. Select a skilled driver, a powerful vehicle, an arsenal of weapons, and supportive sponsors to conquer tactical challenges.

name: Lord of the Other World
description: This game is a more casual strategy war game, it bid farewell to the endless confrontation between players in traditional strategy games! More emphasis on collaboration between players.

name: Kortstrid
description: Kortstrid: a captivating TCG in a vast fantasy world. Battle with unique heroes, foes, and companions in strategic, ever-evolving gameplay. Dive into an enthralling adventure filled with camaraderie!

name: 龙傲天的多元宇宙
description: This is a role-playing game in which players play the role of a high school traveler, Yuwenflame, and return to the original world through learning skills, developing attributes, card fighting, collecting cards, and interactive gameplay.

name: 群雄策・牌 Heroes Strategy・KARDS
description: "Heroes Strategy・Heroes Strategy・KARDS" is a strategy card competitive game with European and American cartoon style. they can like. In troubled times, there are clever tricks in the bag. What is the world, boil wine and talk about heroes!

name: 吞食魏蜀吴
description: Come and build your own three kingdoms!

name: Agent Team Simulator
description: Build a team of Elite Secret Agents, and send them on dangerous missions around the globe.

name: The Dead Await: Prologue
description: Get ready to experience the thrills and chills of The Dead Await: Prologue, a free and fully functional demo! Build your deck and try to survive in this deck-building survival RPG set during a zombie apocalypse.

name: Flora Domina
description: In this unique take on turn-based 4X strategy, play as a nature goddess that defends her island by playing cards to use nature as your ally.

name: 王侯将相-充一返三（三倍返利版）
description: 《王侯将相》是一款三国题材的Q版卡牌收集养成游戏。游戏主角在神秘的三国世界闯荡，会遭遇一系列的神秘关卡和各种强大的敌人。本作包含激情炫酷的战斗，个性鲜明的三国名将，史诗感炸裂的三国城池攻防战，横扫千军的武将战技以及造型各异的绝世神兵和各种奇珍异兽等。随着在不断探索深入，主角终会终会拼杀出属于自己的道路，最终带领自己组建的部队登临顶峰。

name: 火焰征程
description: A classic turn-based strategy card game that allows players to collect various creature cards and skill cards through quests, upgrades, and trading. Players can select their favorite cards to craft a unique deck for battles, immersing themselves in the excitement of strategic gameplay!

name: Zold:out
description: Zold:out is a semi-turn-based tactical RPG combined with deck building. You will use multiple weapons in one turn to challenge powerful enemies in a non-grid battlefield. Recruit clerks, forge weapons, and save the world with your strategy and creativity!

name: Defense Cards
description: Defense Card is a very creative barrage shooting game. It combines the gameplay of barrage shooting and card use. It also has a random in-game growth mechanism, making it an addictive and fast-paced bullet hell game. curtain shooter

name: 一梦封神
description: 《一梦封神》是一款基于封神演义为背景的回合制战斗游戏，以姜子牙的视角游历封神演义中著名的经典战役！并且玩家可获得各种知名英雄，养成自己最强大的队伍。

name: Blue Ribbon Bake Off
description: Blue Ribbon Bake Off is a new, original playing card game. Players work to gather ingredients to complete a recipe and win a blue ribbon at the county fair. Competitors use every trick in the cookbook to stop them. Who will be named the County's Best Baker?

name: Reapers
description: An online battle trading card game set in a dystopian universe, focused on deck building, resource management and trading.

name: Cut Master Spades
description: Quick, seamless, and HIGHLY engaging Spades matches between real people. Play with your friends, enjoy the classic game in immersive 3D with quirky characters. Match up online and climb the leaderboards or just have a chill session with your buddies. There's a table for everyone!

name: Merchant Master
description: A simulation game. Start from scratch to build a merchant empire.

name: Hex And Tricks
description: An adventure card game on witchcraft and magic recipes ! Explore the oppressive real world and the fantastic dream world. Fight colorful characters with your own deck of magic ingredients and monstrous assistants. Solve diverse puzzles to win cards and expand your collection !

name: Snowscapes
description: A cozy nature simulation meets card-based strategy.

name: EWSN Card
description: 「東南牌EWSN Card」是一款2D集換式卡牌遊戲，內含：➤22種不同的卡牌➤3種好玩的小遊戲➤戰鬥後的CG系統➤成就貨幣和任務設計➤4首自制的音樂無限自助的爽快抽卡！成就滿滿的練功升級！輕鬆爆笑的釣魚日常！自己制作的音樂專輯！「東南牌EWSN Card」，正接受你的挑戰！

name: Beecarbonize
description: Do you have what it takes to save the planet? Beecarbonize is an environmental card strategy game with climate change as your opponent.

name: Card Storm Idle
description: Card Storm Idle is an incremental game with both idle and active playstyles. Research and craft card deсk to earn as much resource as possible! Build up your power and see how far you can get. Bring the card storm down on monsters!

name: Shapebreaker - Prologue
description: Play the first deck of Shapebreaker for free. A fusion of tower defense games and roguelike deckbuilders. Use your cards to build towers and to upgrade them in unique ways. Gain rewards to customize your deck, defense and playstyle. Break the shapes before they break you!

name: Romp of Dump
description: Visual novel fully animated in Live2D, Observing Scum Prisoners! In a prison called a dump, a betting card game among dangerous prisoners begins. Penalty game for the losers! Uncover the hidden pasts and bizarre crimes of these lunatics!

name: Durak NTR: the Fool who lost his gf in a card game
description: Play as James, a ruthless loan shark, and turn the tables on a desperate debtor. Each loss drags his girlfriend closer to you in this humiliating, erotic experience of control, power and desire.

name: Underground Waifus TCG
description: Underground Waifus it's a CCG, Deck Builder TCG with PVP Card Battler F2P Game

name: Dream Team Basketball
description: Dream Team Basketball combines traditional CCG gameplay with innovative mechanics inspired from the game of basketball. Explore over 300 player cards and 400 traits and skills to create your team and engage in a competitive environment.

name: Fairytale Fables
description: Dive into a fantastical autobattler where fairytales and legends collide! Choose your hero and assemble your team of characters, items and treasures to outwit opponents in strategic battles where positioning matters. Will you be the last one standing in this enchanted PvP arena?

name: Egyptian Ratslap - Card Game
description: Enjoy a laid-back session of your new favorite card game that mixes the rules of slap jack and more!

name: SPEEDUS -SHEDDING SPEED CARD-
description: "SPEEDUS" is a competitive card battle game based on the classic card game "Speed." Quickly play cards from your hand that follow the numbers on the field! Use skills and abilities! The first player to play all cards from their deck and hand wins!

name: Dream Ploy Will
description: This is a 1V1 game, including round system, war chess, and strategy play. You can freely match your deck, command heroes, summon monsters, and release spells! Compete with game friends or strangers!

name: Stacks:Jungle!
description: Stacks:Jungle is an engaging adventure card game set in the lush heart of the jungle. Unlock new cards with booster packs, combine them to uncover craft recipes, build amazing structures, venture into uncharted territories, make new friends, discover hidden treasures, and so much more!

name: Beast Collector
description: Beast Collector: Capture, Evolve, Battle in this thrilling card game adventure!

name: 坦克队长-高清畅玩版
description: Tank Captain "is a strategic warfare game where players will play the role of commander and engage in different tank combinations to enhance the refined attributes of tanks and artillery. They can enhance their attack or armor abilities according to their preferences and win the war.

name: 三国计-Q萌回合制卡牌
description: 《三国计》以三国历史为背景，重现经典回合战斗模式，各路猛将尽数登场，造型精美英姿重现。游戏内还有丰富多样的养成系统，心仪神将随性培养，花样阵容自由搭配。更能体验在战场上调兵遣将，与其他玩家争霸三国之巅，完成一统大业的恢弘壮志

name: Cards and Castles 2
description: Collectible cards spring to life in this wacky Tactical CCG. Assemble a deck to challenge your friends and rivals, and engage in glorious CARD BATTLES! Will you choose fearsome dragons, or the deadly squirrels?

name: World of Grimm
description: Dive into the enchanting universe of Grimm Fairytales! Collect powerful cards, engage in fast-paced battles, and rewrite the destiny of iconic characters. Unleash your strategic skills in this captivating and fast-paced collectible card game. Join the adventure now!

name: Museum Mystery: Deckbuilding Card Game
description: Museum Mystery is a deck-building, story-driven roguelite adventure where museum exhibits come to life, wreaking chaos. Explore halls from different eras, battle works of art, collect your own deck of artifacts, and solve the mystery!

name: Echo of Ayllu
description: Assemble a team of 8 characters, choose your victory goals, and join the battlefield to access the Energy Rock's power. Far from traditional TCGs, Echo of Ayllu is a magnificent, original, and explosive card game.

name: Wyvern Studios Solitaire: 30th Aniversary Edition
description: Wyvern Studios Solitaire: 30th Anniversary Edition features Klondike Solitaire and Pyramid Solitaire, 9 different deck styles, and supports mouse, keyboard, and gamepads. The base game is offered for free and can be played as is without any cost forever.

name: 棋魂 Chess Soul
description: ChessSoul is a horizontal board flying shooting game that incorporates a card and cultivation system based on STG. The protagonist you play unexpectedly obtains electronic equipment and uses it to shuttle through spacecraft for interstellar battles

name: Color Summoners
description: Color Summoner" is a card game in which players play cards simultaneously on the same turn. Defeat your opponents by reading their actions!

name: 激战王城-三国
description: 《激战王城》突破传统策略游戏的束缚，快速开荒橙将开局，范围连地快速铺路，独创模拟比武，无需战损也可验证阵容。组建自己的阵营，义结群雄共创大业；亦可勇战各路豪杰，夺取无双荣耀；还可剿灭异族捍卫九州，一统万里江山。100万格多变沙盘恭候各位主公的降临，谁又是下一位天下之主？

name: Efir Adventure: Matchcraft
description: Efir Adventure: Matchcraft, a unique hybrid crafting and combat simulator based on match3 mechanics with elements of a fantasy space adventure.

name: Battle Babes
description: Battle Babes is a fast-paced, free-to-play single-player turn-based strategy card game. Collect, strategize, and battle your way to victory with 3+ hero powers! Experiment with 600+ unique cards, each with their own special abilities. Customize your decks and challenge AI decks to a fight!

name: Wizened Dream
description: Withered Dream is a 2D story exploration game based on card stacking and limited-time operation. By modifying the stacking relationship between the cards, new cards can be generated and the story can be advanced. The game contains three stories: going to school, going to work, and being unemployed.

name: 文若九洲记：艳欲之乡
description: 这是一款剧情丰富，玩法大胆创新的卡牌游戏。您将以第一人称视角，扮演古希腊传奇英雄阿奇尔。与来自东方的游侠张文若，和随故事发展依次登场的九位美女熟妇们组成队伍，联手闯关的同时。提升她们的好感，邀请她们共度良宵。

name: Kādomon: Hyper Auto Battlers Prologue
description: Begin your monster-taming journey in Kādomon: Hyper Auto Battlers Prologue. Fight, collect, upgrade and evolve Kādomon to build your ultimate team in this prologue version of Kādomon: Hyper Auto Battlers. Experience the brand-new features, mechanics and Kādomon for the first time.

name: Mariam Game
description: Mariam Game is a narrative game, set in a fantasy version by help her get back to her home, where your choices impact the fate of you and Mariam. "Survival Horror", "Puzzle" and "Clicker" and get story hints by playing "Cards Mode" and completing all the levels.

name: Sexy Blackjack
description: Come in, sit down and play a few hands of Blackjack. Relax in a casino atmosphere with one of our three sexy dealers, each one featuring a unique personality and plenty of costumes to unlock.

name: Summon Masters
description: "Summon Masters" is a fair online turn-based strategy card game, allowing players to formulate their own decks with various cards for free battles.

name: Twistingo Free
description: Explore three captivating games in one free package! Bird Paradise, Turtle Bay, and Hummingbird Haven await with an array of puzzles, adventures, and mini-games. Dive into a world filled with challenges and exciting discoveries!

name: Esports Godfather: The Legend Begins
description: E-sports Godfather is a Deck-building game simulating MOBA e-sports. You will play a role as team coach and build your team. You need to train players and make strategies in various game versions, beat other teams and finally, take the Champion of the World. Be nobody, or lead your team to dominate!

name: ScreenPlay CCG
description: A comical CCG where movie characters rule on and off screen. Build decks with genre tropes and eccentric stars, and outsmart rival directors in simultaneous-turn battles. Complete your Leads' story arcs to win chaotic cinematic showdowns.

name: 极限侦探
description: 本作是一款宣传天津特色文化的游戏，灵感来自天津盘头大姨，以及经常出现在三轮车车身广告上的侦探。邀请了真正的天津大姨为游戏中的角色配音，向玩家展示天津本地的人文文化、方言和轻松快乐的生活观念。

name: Idle Heros
description: 《IDLE HEROS》 is a special placement game, invite your friends to form a fixed team, come to participate in the battle, placement can easily obtain a variety of resources

name: Maze pursuit
description: A Roguelike survival science fiction game, easy to operate, quickly get started

name: 元卡牌2 MetaCard2 序章 Prologue
description: Building on the rich card entries of the first generation, this game innovatively incorporates the concept of projectiles. With strategic card combinations and projectile aiming and bouncing features, it guarantees you a refreshing, one-of-a-kind experience with no alternatives online!

name: Bud Masters - Peace Edition
description: Bud Masters - 'Peace Edition' is a fun, easy to pick up nostalgic weed lifestyle card game. Free from deck building or any additional complexities, 'Peace Edition' is a casual, chill, yet challenging card game with no additional accounts, no micro-transactions or in game purchases required.

name: Catch Them Sweetie
description: Welcome to the card fishing simulator! Time to clear the pond of monsters. Pick a target, build the Deck, and try your Luck! Oh, and don't touch the duck, okay?

name: SolForge Fusion
description: SolForge Fusion is a collectible card-battler where you are a mighty Forgeborn. Command fierce creatures, cast powerful spells, level up your cards, and crush your foes to earn glorious rewards. Created by Richard Garfield (Magic: The Gathering) and Justin Gary (Ascension).

name: Cool Cucumber Cricket
description: When you think of cricket what comes to mind? That's right this game needs more cards! In This game you'll attempt to lead your team to test victories by playing cards that make your players better or their players worse.

name: Deck of Delirium
description: Deck of Delirium is a PvE deckbuilding card game where you build your own misfit crew full of animals, pirates, animal pirates, pompous sailors, and even cultists to make your way through the perilous journey across the sea battling rogue pirates, sea monsters, and other uncanny enemies.

name: Atman:Rebel Flame
description: "Atman Rebel Flame" is a cyberpunk card-building game that supports multiplayer battles with no external numerical growth to ensure fairness . Choose your hero and support cards, elevate your phase and select talents, defeat opponents and claim victory!

name: Scarlet Thread
description: Scalet Thread is a deck building game. Our core game is based on PVP ranked game .More postion strategy, More resource management ,Fight at winning blocks and get more resource at "Jungle".PVE Mode provided is a roguelike deck building game. you could pick up random cards during the PVE sessions .

name: Limb From Limb
description: The Raymond Mitchell Association personally invites you to join our new limb regrowth program. Engage in a game of chance against another patient, risking the loss of your fingers. We have provided items to aid in your success waiting to be uncovered as you traverse the game board.

name: 攻城与召唤 Siege and Summons 【5分钟一局 策略竞技 】
description: Siege and Summon is an online turn-based competitive card game set in the Three Kingdoms era. Players can use soldier cards and skill cards to build a deck of cards to challenge powerful players in the world of the tk. NPCs can also fight against other players and form teams to challenge dungeons.

name: AI Solitaire
description: AI Solitaire features Klondike Solitaire and Pyramid Solitaire, 18 different deck styles, and has password protected parental controls. The base game is offered for free and can be played as is without any cost forever.
